items.description: New in Claude Code: /checkup Run /checkup to: 1. Clean up unused skills/MCPs/plugins and save context 2. Dedup your local CLAUDE.md against the checked in CLAUDE.md 3. Break up root CLAUDE.md into nested CLAUDE.md's + skills 4. Turn off sl…
items.description_zh: Claude 代码中的新增功能： /checkup 运行 /checkup 到： 1. 清理未使用的技能/MCP/插件并保存上下文 2. 根据签入的 CLAUDE.md 删除本地 CLAUDE.md 3. 将根 CLAUDE.md 分解为嵌套的 CLAUDE.md + 技能 4. 关闭 sl...

items.title: You know OpenAI is cooking when the sushi and tacos orders pile at the entrance of the of…
items.title_zh: 当寿司和炸玉米饼订单堆积在餐厅入口处时，您就知道 OpenAI 正在做饭。
items.description: You know OpenAI is cooking when the sushi and tacos orders pile at the entrance of the office at 11pm. Bizarrely we need to eat to cook.
items.description_zh: 晚上 11 点，当寿司和炸玉米饼订单堆积在办公室入口处时，您就知道 OpenAI 正在做饭。奇怪的是我们需要吃饭才能做饭。

items.title: I can finally talk about this.

items.description_zh: 我终于可以谈论这个了。我玩《GTA 6》已经大约一个月了。它非常棒，甚至可以说比 GTA 5 还要好。

items.title: Important Product Marketing lesson!
items.description: Important Product Marketing lesson! You’re writing a story to transmit to your audience, but also for your audience to transmit to their audience. PMM > Sales > Customer PMM > Customer > Peer PMM > User > Buyer PMM > C…

items.title: I watched Glenngarry Glenn Ross again recently, and the Alec Baldwin bit that struck me w…
items.title_zh: 我最近又看了一次格伦加里·格伦·罗斯，亚历克·鲍德温的片段让我印象深刻……
items.description: I watched Glenngarry Glenn Ross again recently, and the Alec Baldwin bit that struck me wasn’t “always be closing” — it was [First place gets a car, second place gets steak knives, third place is fired] Power law in action!
items.description_zh: 我最近又看了一次《格伦加里·格伦·罗斯》，亚历克·鲍德温给我留下深刻印象的部分并不是“总是关闭”——而是[第一名得到一辆汽车，第二名得到牛排刀，第三名被解雇]幂律在起作用！

items.title: When do we stop comparing autonomous agents to hand-written code?
